summary: GH-95 minimal spec is approved for a package-local redacted fixture format PR. The spec correctly limits scope to fixture metadata, redacted source summary, normalized sample, placeholder source/evidence refs, manifest/lifecycle fixture refs, and GH-95 carrier binding.
reviewed_validation_summary: Local validation passed on 2026-07-01 for `jq empty` over manifest/lifecycle/fixture/Loom JSON, targeted `jq -e` fixture reference checks, `git diff --check`, `loom fact-chain --target . --json`, `loom suite validate --target . --item GH-95 --json`, and `loom suite carrier validate --target . --item GH-95 --json`; `loom build --target . --item GH-95 --build-evidence .loom/specs/GH-95/build-evidence.json --json` was classified as a Loom build adapter gap after direct suite and carrier validation passed.
follow_ups: Run GH-96 before treating the fixture as validator-enforced.
Run GH-97 and GH-98 before treating post-check output or failure mapping as complete.
